_Write a concise description of the change to the development or operations process you're proposing._

Discussion thread: [Link]

## Current state

_Describe how the relevant part of the process works today, and where it falls short._

## Proposed change

_Describe the proposed change to the process. How will contributors work differently? What conventions, automation, or guardrails does it introduce?_

## Motivation

_Why should this change be made? What problem does it solve, and for whom? What is the expected outcome?_

## Impact

HIGH | MEDIUM | LOW

_Who is affected — which contributors, roles, or workflows? Identify any tooling or dependencies that need to be considered._

## Alternatives

_What other approaches were considered, if any? Why is this approach preferred?_

## Additional notes

_Any open questions, risks, or context that would help stakeholders evaluate this idea._
